title: Skill Trigger Handlers Analysis
description: Analysis of skill trigger handler classes and their effect data structures from Ghidra decompilation

analyzed_handlers.description: Adds a skill to the actor when any skill matching a filter is used. The gained skill is removed at round end.

functions.name: OnAnySkillUsed
functions.purpose: Called when any skill is used. Checks filter, and either adds or refreshes the effect skill.

functions.name: OnRoundEnd
functions.purpose: Called at round end. Removes any skill that was added by this effect.

functions.name: TryAddEffect
functions.purpose: Creates and adds the effect skill to the skill container.

functions.name: Create
functions.purpose: Factory method that creates a new handler instance with effect data at offset 0x18.

0x10.name: ParentSkill
0x10.description: Reference to the parent skill that owns this handler.

0x18.name: EffectData
0x18.description: Reference to the effect data ScriptableObject containing configuration.

0x58.name: SkillTemplate
0x58.description: Reference to the skill template to create and add when triggered.

0x60.name: SkillFilter
0x60.description: Filter that determines which skills trigger this effect. Can be null (any skill triggers).

0x68.name: RefreshOnUse
0x68.description: If true and the skill already exists, remove it before re-adding (refresh behavior).

analyzed_handlers.description: Triggers a skill when accumulated HP loss reaches a threshold percentage of max HP. Can be limited to once per round.

functions.name: OnDamageReceived
functions.purpose: Called when damage is received. Accumulates damage and checks if threshold is met.

functions.name: OnMissionStarted
functions.purpose: Called at mission start. Resets accumulated damage and last trigger round to 0.

functions.name: TriggerSkillAndReset
functions.purpose: Creates the triggered skill, uses it on self, and resets state.

functions.name: Create
functions.purpose: Factory method that creates a new handler instance with effect data at offset 0x18.

functions.name: .ctor (Effect Data)
functions.purpose: Constructor for TriggerSkillOnHpLost effect data. Sets default HpLostThreshold=25 and OncePerRound=true.

0x10.name: ParentSkill
0x10.description: Reference to the parent skill that owns this handler.

0x18.name: EffectData
0x18.description: Reference to the effect data ScriptableObject containing configuration.

0x20.name: AccumulatedDamage
0x20.description: Runtime state: Accumulated damage since last trigger or mission start.

0x24.name: LastTriggerRound
0x24.description: Runtime state: Round number when skill was last triggered (for OncePerRound check).

0x58.name: HpLostThreshold
0x58.description: HP loss threshold as percentage of max HP (e.g., 25 = 25%). Default: 0x19 (25).

0x60.name: SkillTemplate
0x60.description: Reference to the skill template to create and use when threshold is met.

0x68.name: OncePerRound
0x68.description: If true, the skill can only trigger once per round. Default: true.

logic_notes.trigger_condition: Damage must be real HP damage (not armor/absorbed), entity must be alive
logic_notes.skill_usage: Skill is used on self with SkillUsageReason 0x13

analyzed_handlers.description: Consumes (removes) the parent skill when any skill matching a filter is used.

functions.name: OnAnySkillUsed
functions.purpose: Called when any skill is used. Checks filter and removes parent skill if matched.

functions.name: Create
functions.purpose: Factory method that creates a new handler instance with effect data at offset 0x18.

0x10.name: ParentSkill
0x10.description: Reference to the parent skill that will be removed when triggered.

0x18.name: EffectData
0x18.description: Reference to the effect data ScriptableObject containing configuration.

0x58.name: SkillFilter
0x58.description: Filter that determines which skills trigger consumption. Can be null (any skill triggers).

logic_notes.consumption: Calls BaseSkill.RemoveSelf() on the parent skill at offset 0x10
logic_notes.filter_behavior: If filter is null or passes, the skill is consumed

common_patterns.skill_filter_interface: ISkillFilter - Used to filter which skills trigger effects
common_patterns.skill_creation: SkillTemplate.CreateSkill() creates skill instances from templates
common_patterns.skill_container: Actor's skill container manages skill addition/removal
